query:
SELECT a.id, a.pdiId, a.titulo, a.status, a.prazo, a.createdAt, a.updatedAt,
               u.name as userName,
               m.nome as macroNome
        FROM actions a
        LEFT JOIN pdis p ON a.pdiId = p.id
        LEFT JOIN users u ON p.colaboradorId = u.id
        LEFT JOIN competenciasMacros m ON a.macroId = m.id
        ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC
        LIMIT 5;
